Bolt.focus: Ensure any test script loops (like in verify_service_hardening.sh) use native bash features and avoid excessive subshell overhead.

Palette.focus: Improve log output clarity in core scripts and refine error handling messages for better troubleshooting UX (e.g., build.sh).

Sentinel.focus: Audit the systemd sandboxing directives in all modified .service files. Ensure no critical privileges are unnecessarily granted.
